title: Vinnaithaandi Lyrics Irandam Ulagam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Vinnaithaandi
Singer: Vijay Prakash
Movie: Irandam Ulagam
Music: Harrrish Jeyara		 .

Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Vinnaithaandi anbae vandhaai
ennull nadukkama
Unnaal nindra idhayam ondru
meendum thudikumaa

Maraindhadhu angae, malarndhadhu ingae
maayama maayamaa
Sol nadandhadhu poiyaa
nadapadhu poiyaa
kaadhale niyaayamaa
En kadhal nila
un kai veetile
en aagaayam rendaaga
therinkindradho ...

Neeya neeya
nilvondru neeya neeyaa
Meiyaa poiyaa
kannil minnum kadhal poiyaa (2)

Andha panikangal pongum
oli paarval
ennai kollaamal
kolludhadi
idhu nijam thaana ?
illai nizhal thaana ?
enna vinodham indha vali

Unnai marutha pinnum
ennam vazhkinddhe
vazhve maayamaa ?
Kannai thirandhapadi
innum kanavadi
ellaam sogamaa?

Karugiya nenjukul melliya eeram nee
kadhalai meetkuma?
Naan kadhalilum illai
nijathilum illai
kaadhale niyayama ?

Vinnaithaandi anbae vandhaai
ennull nadukkama
Unnaal nindra idhayam ondru
meendum thudikumaa

Idhu pudhu logam
adhu pudhu vaanam
angu nilaakkal rendu undu
Ival aval thaana ?
aval ival thaana ?
endra vinaakkal nenjil undu
Idhu arundhaalum
thasai aerindhaalum
onmaa? aliyumaa ?

Endhan per enna ?
endhan uravenna ?
ivan ullam ariyuma ?

Kadhal unmai endraal
vaanum mannum maarum
kadhalae kadavulaa ?

Neeya neeya
nilvondru neeya neeyaa
Meiyaa poiyaa
kannil minnum
kadhal poiyaa ..Vinnaithaandi

Maraindhadhu angae, malarndhadhu ingae
maayama maayamaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Vinnaithaandi?

The song Vinnaithaandi expresses themes of love and longing, reflecting the emotional journey of the characters in Irandam Ulagam.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Irandam Ulagam, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's feelings of love and connection.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Vijay Prakash and composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was Vinnaithaandi released?

Vinnaithaandi was released on August 5, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vinnaithaandi, the protagonist expresses deep emotions of love and yearning, making it a poignant moment in Irandam Ulagam. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and romance. It beautifully captures the essence of longing and connection, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. The combination of Vijay Prakash's voice and Harrish Jeyaraj's composition creates an unforgettable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vinnaithaandi is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Vijay Prakash's soulful voice and Harrish Jeyaraj's enchanting composition, this song from the film Irandam Ulagam resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the emotional depth and lyrical beauty that make this track a standout in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: You came to me from the sky, my heart beats again because of you. Will it start beating once more?
What is lost over there, what blooms over here, is it all an illusion? Is it true or just a shadow? What a joke this pain is.
You, you are standing there, are you really you? Is love just a lie that shines in the eyes?
Those sounds of work, will they not take me away? Is this real or just a shadow? What a joke this pain is.
Will I live by forgetting you? If I open my eyes, will all my dreams be sad?
In this troubled heart, will you meet love softly? Am I not in love or in reality, is love just a justice?
You came to me from the sky, my heart beats again because of you. Will it start beating once more?
This is a new world, that is a new sky, are there two moons over there? Is she the one? Is she the one? This question is in my heart. Is it true or false?
What is my name? What is my identity? Does he know my heart?
If love is true, does the sky and earth change? Is love a god?
You, you are standing there, are you really you? Is love just a lie that shines in the eyes? ... You came from the sky.
What is lost over there, what blooms over here, is it all an illusion? Is it true or just a shadow? What a joke this pain is.
